name: ui-automation-cypress-typescript-bdd
description: Cypress TypeScript BDD UI automation framework for Sauce Demo.

scripts.test: cypress run --browser chrome --env tags="not @slow and not @extended"
scripts.test:headed: cypress run --headed --browser chrome --env tags="not @slow and not @extended"
scripts.test:chrome: cypress run --browser chrome --env tags="not @slow and not @extended"
scripts.test:report: cypress run --browser chrome --env tags="not @slow and not @extended" --reporter mocha-junit-reporter --reporter-options mochaFile=results/junit/results.xml
scripts.validate: npm run typecheck && npm run test
